title: Thumbay Healthcare launches Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy Unit and Royale Presidential Suite in Ajman
summary: Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy works by delivering pure oxygen in a pressurized chamber, helping the body repair damaged tissues more efficiently.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE—Thumbay Healthcare has expanded its specialist care and premium patient services with the opening of two new facilities at Thumbay Medicity in Al Jurf, Ajman.

The healthcare group officially inaugurated a new Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy (HBOT) unit at Thumbay Physical Therapy and Rehabilitation Hospital, alongside the Royale Presidential Suite at Thumbay University Hospital.

The ceremony took place on April 22, 2026, in the presence of H.E. Yousef Mohammed Ali Al Nuaimi, Deputy Chairman of Emirates Health Services (EHS), who formally opened both facilities.

Senior officials tour new facilities

Following the ribbon-cutting ceremony, Al Nuaimi toured the newly launched units with Akbar Moideen Thumbay, Vice President of the Healthcare Division at Thumbay Group.

During the visit, he inspected the HBOT chamber, viewed the Royale Presidential Suite, and met members of the clinical team.

Speaking during the event, Al Nuaimi praised Thumbay Group’s continued role in strengthening healthcare and education in the UAE.

He said he was pleased to see the organization’s growth in both sectors and reaffirmed the support of Emirates Health Services for its future efforts.

His remarks highlighted the growing importance of public-private collaboration in advancing healthcare standards and expanding access to quality services nationwide.

New Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy services

The newly launched HBOT unit introduces an advanced treatment option designed to support faster healing and recovery.

Hyperbaric oxygen therapy works by delivering pure oxygen in a pressurized chamber, helping the body repair damaged tissues more efficiently.

The therapy is commonly used for chronic wounds, diabetic foot ulcers, radiation injuries, and recovery after surgery.

In addition, clinicians increasingly use HBOT in rehabilitation programs for neurological and complex conditions.

These include stroke recovery, traumatic brain injury, spinal cord injury, post-concussion syndrome, sleep disorders, learning difficulties, and cerebral palsy.

By adding this service, Thumbay Healthcare aims to expand access to specialized rehabilitation treatment within the region while reducing the need for patients to travel abroad for certain therapies.

Premium care through Royale Presidential Suite

At the same time, Thumbay University Hospital has introduced the Royale Presidential Suite, a high-end inpatient space designed for patients seeking privacy, comfort, and personalized service.

The suite combines medical care with hospitality-focused amenities, creating a premium environment for local VIP patients, international visitors, executives, and individuals who prefer exclusive hospital accommodation.

The new offering reflects growing demand for healthcare experiences that balance medical excellence with comfort, discretion, and convenience.

Leadership highlights evolving patient expectations

Akbar Moideen Thumbay said the dual launch reflects how modern healthcare continues to evolve beyond treatment alone.

He noted that patients today expect strong clinical outcomes together with dignity, convenience, and a higher level of personalized care.

According to him, the new HBOT unit will help improve recovery timelines for many patients who require specialized healing support.

He added that the Royale Presidential Suite demonstrates the group’s commitment to combining advanced medicine with comfort-driven care.

He also said both additions support Thumbay Healthcare’s broader goal of building a comprehensive academic health system that leads in clinical capability, innovation, and patient experience.

Expanding Thumbay Medicity’s healthcare network

Thumbay Healthcare remains one of the UAE’s largest private academic healthcare networks, integrating hospitals, medical education, and research across its operations.

With the addition of the HBOT unit and the Royale Presidential Suite, Thumbay Medicity continues to strengthen its role as a destination for advanced treatment, rehabilitation services, and premium healthcare in the UAE.
